caption: The video begins with a close-up shot of a single domino piece lying flat on a white surface. The domino is positioned towards the right side of the frame, and its black face with white dots is clearly visible. As the video progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and the focus moves away from the domino, resulting in a blurred image of the white surface. The background remains consistent throughout, maintaining a clean and minimalistic appearance. The transition from a sharp, detailed view of the domino to a soft, out-of-focus scene suggests a deliberate change in perspective or a shift in the video's narrative focus.
